summary: Login page returns 500 error on submit
description: When a user submits the login form the server responds with a 500 internal error and the session is not created.

summary: Signing in fails with internal server error 500
description: Users cannot sign in. The login submit button triggers a 500 error from the backend and no session cookie is set.

summary: Export to CSV produces empty file
description: The CSV export feature downloads a file with headers only and no data rows for large reports.

summary: CSV report download is empty for big date ranges
description: When exporting reports as CSV over a wide date range the resulting file contains no data rows, only the header line.

summary: Add dark mode to the settings screen
description: Feature request: allow users to toggle a dark color theme from the settings screen.
